content: Amenify is a real estate technology company that offers professional cleaning, chores, housekeeping, dog walking, food delivery, and other lifestyle services for multifamily residents. Amenify is the leading AI-powered resident commerce platform that helps property managers and residents with services they love. Through a proprietary network of local providers, enterprise integrations, and personalized concierge tools, Amenify powers services like local retail, dining, grocery, home services, maintenance, and more. Through its API integrations powering resident engagement, Amenify is available in 15 million homes in the USA.

Amenify offers managed service teams for house cleaning, chores, food/grocery service, handyman, dog walking, home shopping, and more. Residents can earn points on rent and unlock benefits in their neighborhood. New residents get $50 sign-up benefits. Services include: Cleaning Services, Chores Services, Handyman Services, Moving Service, Move Out Cleaning, Food & Grocery Services, Dog Walking Services, Pool Cleaners, Lawn Care, and Home Shopping (ACommerce).

Amenify offers seamless platform designed for real estate developers, operators, and property managers to optimize the performance of their properties. Features include: Vetted Service Professionals - we vet, hire, and train dedicated teams for your communities with professionals assigned specific time windows based on data-driven resident feedback. Automated Resident Marketing - we create all marketing assets, leverage major PMS integrations, and handle Resident onboarding. Real-Time Booking Engine - Residents and Managers can order, manage, and edit their bookings safely and securely with assisted key releases. 7-Day a Week Support - our Pros are trained for 5-star service and our Concierge team is available 7 days a week. Amenify Cash To Drive Adoption - available for owners with low operating budgets for amenity services, with more options for enterprise customers.

Drive Engagement by delivering on-demand services that foster loyalty and build strong tenant relationships. Increase Revenue by monetising amenities and generate additional income with subscription-based services. Drive 5-star reviews through consistent, high-quality services like cleaning, grocery delivery, and handyman support. Andrew Stewart, Chairman Venterra Realty (23,000 homes), says Amenify 'Undoubtedly enhances our Resident Experience'.

Amenify's technology platform powers local businesses to scale to millions of apartment homes across the US for many different Home Services. They take a very data driven approach to Engineering and use AI/ML to provide maximum value to customers. Amenify is available to API Partners for integration. The platform includes a Real-Time Booking Engine for safe and secure bookings with assisted key releases.

Amenify's mission is to strengthen communities by powering services and products in residential homes. They are passionate about customer-centric products that build trust with apartment residents, property management, and service providers. Amenify has raised $20 Million to date from strategic PropTech investors: UnitLeader, WISE Ventures, Corevest, and RET Ventures. The in-home services industry is growing at 52% CAGR through 2029.

Amenify leadership team: Everett Lynn - Founder and CEO. Danish Chopra - Co-Founder, CTO / COO. Todd Stecker - Vice President, Revenue. Nick Zamonis - Marketing, Board Member. Ed Dailey - Finance, Board Member. For career opportunities, contact careers@amenify.com. Amenify is looking for people who are Helpful, Hungry, Humble, and Happy (the four H's).

Amenify's core values are: Long-Term - Prioritize lasting wins over short-term benefits. Accountability - We take ownership and finish what we start. Meritocracy - Equal opportunity focusing only on results. Always Learning - Win or lose, every day we get better. Win-wins - Create value and doing well by doing good.

Q: What services does Amenify provide? A: Amenify offers home cleaning services, handyman services, chores services, food delivery, grocery delivery services and more. Whether you need assistance cleaning your home, hanging shelves, running errands, or having groceries delivered to your doorstep, we streamline all your household needs.

Q: How do I find out if Amenify offers services near me? A: Amenify is live in all the cities in the US. The Amenify Resident App allows you to easily schedule any of our services, including house cleaning service, apartment cleaning services, and chores services near me.

Q: Are your residential cleaners and other Service Pros trained and background-checked? A: Absolutely. Amenify carefully vets all residential cleaners and regularly monitors performance of all Pros including Handyman. The training process emphasizes not only cleaning expertise but also reliability and professionalism, giving you peace of mind with every visit.

Q: Can Amenify handle urgent household tasks like handyman services? A: Yes. Alongside scheduled cleaning, Amenify offers handyman services for minor repairs and maintenance. This includes fixing leaks, mounting TVs, and other small projects that can be difficult to tackle on your own.

Q: Do you offer food delivery and grocery delivery services? A: Yes! Amenify partners with trusted providers to fulfill food delivery and grocery delivery requests. You can schedule deliveries through the easy-to-use platform, eliminating the hassle of traffic, long lines, or last-minute store runs.

Q: Is there a difference between house cleaning and apartment cleaning services? A: Yes. House cleaning service is tailored to larger spaces and includes tasks like cleaning multiple bathrooms, spacious kitchens, and extended living areas. Apartment cleaning services focus on efficiently cleaning smaller spaces without compromising quality. Either way, teams follow a thorough checklist customized to your needs.

Q: Does Amenify offer move out cleaning services for rentals? A: Absolutely. Move out cleaning services are perfect for renters looking to secure their deposits or homeowners preparing to sell. Amenify's cleaning teams address everything from deep-cleaning appliances to dusting baseboards, ensuring a spotless environment.

Q: Why should I choose Amenify over other home cleaning companies? A: Amenify has exclusive tie ups with your community and offers Signup and monthly credits. Amenify stands out by integrating multiple lifestyle services—like chores services, food delivery, and handyman services—into one user-friendly platform. They deliver exceptional residential cleaning services combined with advanced technology, flexible scheduling, and top-notch customer support, making them the go-to solution for all household needs. Amenify gives you the freedom to plan cleaning tasks that vary depending on your needs, availability, budget and more.

Amenify works with Service Professionals (Pros) who provide cleaning, handyman, chores, dog walking, and other home services to residents. Pros are vetted, trained, and assigned specific time windows based on data-driven resident feedback. Service Pros can log in at servicepro.amenify.com or field-tech.amenify.com. Providers can log in at provider.amenify.com.

Amenify offers API integration for technology partners. The platform enables third-party systems to connect with Amenify's booking and service management engine. This powers resident engagement across millions of apartment homes in the USA.

Amenify offers a platform for local merchants to connect with residents in multifamily communities. Through ACommerce, residents can shop products and access local services. Merchants can leverage Amenify's network to reach apartment residents across the US.

Amenify offers a Resident Protection Plan for apartment residents. This plan provides coverage and protection for residents, giving them peace of mind. For more details, residents can visit amenify.com/resident-protection-plan.
Amenify provides professional moving services to help residents move in and move out of their apartments or homes. This service is designed to make the moving process smooth and stress-free.

Amenify offers professional dog walking services for residents. Dog walkers are vetted and trained professionals who provide safe and reliable walks for residents' pets. This service can be scheduled through the Amenify app.

Amenify's ACommerce feature allows residents to shop for products from local merchants without leaving their home. Residents can order products through the Amenify platform and have them delivered directly to their apartment.

Amenify offers Resident Gifts as a service for property managers. This allows property managers to automatically send gifts and perks to residents as part of their welcome packages or loyalty programs. Resident Gifts help drive engagement and improve resident satisfaction.

Amenify provides Leasing Concession services for property managers to attract new residents. This allows property managers to offer Amenify service credits as incentives during the leasing process, helping to differentiate their properties in the rental market.
Amenify offers commercial cleaning services for office spaces and commercial properties. This service is available for property managers who need professional cleaning for their commercial assets.

Amenify provides 7-day a week support. The Concierge team is available 7 days a week. Residents can sign in at amenify.com/sign-in-sign-up. For enterprise inquiries or general contact, visit amenify.com/contact-us. For careers, email careers@amenify.com.

Residents can sign up for Amenify and get $50 in benefits. The Amenify Resident App allows residents to schedule all services including house cleaning, apartment cleaning, chores, handyman, dog walking, food delivery, and grocery delivery. Residents earn points on rent and unlock monthly benefits in their neighborhood. The app can be accessed at amenify.app.link.

Amenify sees major opportunities in the proptech space: Unprecedented shift to innovation from Real Estate Managers, AI toolkits to streamline projects that weren't possible before, Rise of convenience for consumers, e-Commerce growth vs. traditional retail (shop from home), In-home services industry growing at 52% CAGR through 2029. As the number of communities on the Amenify platform grows, the company can increase the value of their network by launching more services, products, and analytics.
